actions.action: Action 1: Clear Input Fields - Click 'Clear fields' button. - All input fields are empty.

Action 2: Validate First Ratio Preset - Tap the first ratio button. - Confirm the Width and Height fields of the original size section, are automatically populated with the ratio values shown on the ratio button we clicked. - Tap the Calculate button. - Confirm a visual shape is displayed that matches the selected ratio. - Verify that the calculated aspect ratio value is displayed as a number.

Action 3: Custom Calculation with Second Ratio Preset - Tap the second ratio button. - Confirm the Width and Height fields of the original size section, are automatically populated with the ratio values shown on the ratio button we clicked. - Enter 100 into the Width field under New Size - Tap the Calculate button - Confirm a visual shape is displayed that matches the selected ratio. - Verify the result section shows two rows of numbers: 1. The calculated resolution (matching the input width and the corresponding calculated height). 2. The numerical result of the aspect ratio division (e.g., 4 : 3 = 1.33).

Action 4: Custom Calculation with Height selection - Enter 100 into the Height field under New Size - Confirm Width in New Size section is clear now - Tap the Calculate button - Confirm a visual shape is displayed that matches the selected ratio. - Verify the result section shows two rows of numbers: 1. The calculated resolution (matching the input height and the corresponding calculated width). 2. The numerical result of the aspect ratio division (e.g., 4 : 3 = 1.33).
Action 5: Check auto clearance on selection - Enter 200 into the Width field under New Size - Confirm Height in New Size section is clear now
Action 6: Confirm that the ad banner is visible - Confirm that the ad banner is visible at the bottom of the screen

Action 7: Open help dialog - Press the lightbulb icon at the toolbar - Confirm you are seeing a dialog that explains some things about aspect ratio - Press the button - Confirm that you are back to main calculator screen
